title: Project Setup & Design System Foundation
description: Initialize Next.js 14+ project with App Router, configure Tailwind CSS with the full design token system from the PRD (colors, typography, spacing, shadows, border radius), set up TypeScript interfaces for all data models (Project, BlogPost, Author, TechItem, Experience, Skill, ContactFormData), configure next/font with Space Grotesk/Inter/JetBrains Mono, and set up the base CSS variables and global styles. This establishes the complete design foundation that all other stories depend on.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js 14+ project boots with `npm run dev` without errors
Tailwind config extends with all color tokens (background, primary, accent, text, border, semantic colors)
All TypeScript interfaces match PRD data models exactly
Font configuration uses next/font/google with Space Grotesk, Inter, JetBrains Mono
CSS variables are defined for all design tokens in globals.css
TypeScript types pass strict typecheck with no errors
Tests for design token exports pass

title: Core UI Component Library
description: Install and configure shadcn/ui components (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Textarea, Label, Separator, Skeleton, Toast, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Accordion, Avatar, ScrollArea, Sheet, Tabs, Command). Create a component variant system following the PRD design tokens. Implement Framer Motion animation variants (fadeUpVariants, scaleVariants, pageVariants, staggerContainer) and micro-interaction configs. Build the Button component with all variants (primary, secondary, ghost, destructive) and all sizes (sm, md, lg, icon). Build Card component with interactive variant and hover states. Create Badge component with all variants. Export a motionWrapper for spring animations.
acceptanceCriteria: All shadcn/ui components render correctly with dark theme
Button component has primary/secondary/ghost/destructive variants with hover/active/disabled/loading states
Card component has default/interactive/featured variants with hover effects matching PRD
Badge component has all 7 variants (default, primary, secondary, accent, success, warning, error)
Framer Motion variants (fadeUpVariants, scaleVariants, pageVariants, staggerContainer) are exported and work
Skeleton component has pulse/wave animations
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for core components render pass

title: Global Layout Components — Header & Footer
description: Build the global Header component with fixed positioning, backdrop blur, logo (gradient text linking to /), desktop navigation links (Ana Sayfa, Projeler, Blog, Hakkında, İletişim), and social icons (right side). Implement scroll-triggered border-bottom. Build mobile hamburger menu that triggers full-screen overlay with vertical nav links and social icons at bottom. Build Footer with 4-column layout: about snippet, quick links (terminal-style // quick_links header), social icons, and copyright. Both must use the PRD design tokens and support all responsive breakpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: Header renders with logo, nav links, and social icons on desktop
Header becomes hamburger menu with full-screen overlay on mobile
Mobile menu animates in with slide transition and closes on nav link click
Footer renders 4-column layout on desktop, stacked on mobile
Terminal-style section headers (// quick_links) render correctly in footer
Active nav link shows text-primary with underline
Hover states on nav links and social icons match PRD micro-interactions
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for Header and Footer render pass

title: Status Indicator & Cursor Glow Components
description: Build the StatusIndicator component with online/offline/busy/away states, ping/pulse/no-animation options, and sm/md/lg sizes. Build the CursorGlowEffect component — a 300px radial gradient that follows the cursor, using Framer Motion useSpring with lerp factor 0.1, primary color at 15% opacity, screen blend mode, disabled on mobile/touch devices. Build the Toast notification system with variants (default, success, error, warning, info), positioned bottom-right (desktop) / bottom-center (mobile), max 3 visible, slide-in animation.
acceptanceCriteria: StatusIndicator renders with correct colors (success/error/warning/muted) and optional ping/pulse animations
CursorGlowEffect follows cursor smoothly with useSpring interpolation
CursorGlowEffect is disabled on mobile (touch devices detected via window.matchMedia)
Toast system shows up to 3 notifications, auto-dismisses after 5000ms
Toast variants have correct colors and icons per PRD
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for StatusIndicator and Toast pass

title: Ana Sayfa (Homepage)
description: Build the full Ana Sayfa page (/) according to the PRD. Hero section: terminal-style greeting '> Merhaba, ben Hikmet_' in monospace, animated typing effect cycling through roles ('Full-Stack Developer', 'UI/UX Designer', 'Problem Solver'), gradient text heading, subheading (max-width 600px), CTA buttons ('Hakkımda Bilgi Al' primary, 'Projeleri Gör' secondary), availability status badge with ping animation, social icons (LinkedIn, GitHub, Twitter/X) with hover scale, scroll indicator (bouncing chevron). Featured Projects section: '// featured_projects' terminal header, 3-column responsive grid (max 6 projects), hover lift effect. Recent Writing section: '// recent_writing' header, 3-column grid (max 3 posts). CTA section: gradient border, centered text + 'İletişime Geç' button. Background: subtle gradient mesh + scanlines overlay (opacity 0.03). All scroll animations use fade-up with stagger.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero typing animation cycles through all three roles correctly
Gradient text uses bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-accent bg-clip-text
CTA buttons render in correct variant and link to correct routes
Status badge shows with green ping animation
Featured projects grid is responsive (3/2/1 columns)
Card hover effect matches PRD (translateY(-4px), shadow-lg, border-primary)
CTA section has gradient border effect
All scroll-reveal animations trigger with proper stagger
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for homepage render pass

title: Projeler Listesi Page
description: Build the Projeler page (/projects) with page header (title + description), sticky filter bar with category buttons (Tümü, Web, Mobil, Açık Kaynak, Freelance) with active state styling, search-triggering Command palette (Cmd+K), and responsive project grid. ProjectCard component: thumbnail (16:9 aspect), title, short description (2 lines max, truncated), tech stack pills (bg-background-subtle, rounded-full), GitHub/Demo links with hover effects. Card hover: border-primary, shadow-glow-primary, translateY(-4px). Implement loading skeleton (6 cards with shimmer), empty state (illustration + 'Filtreleme ile eşleşen proje bulunamadı'), and error state (error message + retry button). Grid: 3-column desktop, 2-column tablet, 1-column mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter bar is sticky after header scroll with border-bottom
Active filter shows bg-primary with white text
ProjectCard renders thumbnail, title, description (2 lines max), tech pills
Card hover shows border-primary, glow, and lift effect
Tech pills use bg-background-subtle with rounded-full
Skeleton loaders show 6 cards with shimmer animation on load
Empty state shows when no projects match filter
Grid is responsive (3/2/1 columns)
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for projects page render pass

title: Proje Detay Page
description: Build the Proje Detay page (/projects/[slug]) with full-width hero thumbnail (max-height 500px), centered content container (max-width 800px). Sections: project header (title, date, client for freelance), overview (problem statement, solution, impact), tech stack grid (icons + names), gallery carousel (if applicable), challenges & solutions accordion, external links (GitHub repo, Live demo). Sticky sidebar (desktop): table of contents + action buttons. Next/Prev project navigation at bottom. Code blocks: background #0d0d12, border, syntax highlighting with copy button top-right. States: content skeleton with sidebar skeleton on load, 404 with project suggestion on not found.
acceptanceCriteria: Dynamic route [slug] renders correct project data
Hero thumbnail displays at max-height 500px
Tech stack renders as grid of icon + name pairs
Challenges & Solutions accordion uses single type with height animation
Sidebar is sticky on desktop (position: sticky, top: 80px)
Next/Prev navigation links work correctly
Code blocks have #0d0d12 background, border, and copy button
Loading skeleton shows content + sidebar skeleton
404 page shows with project suggestion
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for project detail page render pass

title: Blog Listesi Page
description: Build the Blog page (/blog) with 'Writing' header + description, search bar (same style as projects), category filter buttons (Tümü, Teknik, Career, Kişisel, Tutorial), articles grid (2-column desktop, 1-column mobile), and featured article full-width card at top (if pinned). ArticleCard: date (muted) + read time, title (bold), excerpt (2 lines), category badges. Card hover: border-primary, bg-background-elevated, transition 200ms. Featured article: full-width card with larger thumbnail and 'Featured' badge. Loading: 4 skeleton cards. Empty: 'Henüz yazı yok' illustration. No results: 'Aramanıza uygun yazı bulunamadı' + clear filters button.
acceptanceCriteria: Featured article renders as full-width card at top when pinned
ArticleCard shows date, read time, title, excerpt (2 lines), categories
Card hover effect: border-primary, bg-background-elevated
Category filter works and shows active state
Search filters articles correctly
Grid is 2-column desktop, 1-column mobile
Skeleton loaders show 4 cards on load
Empty state shows when no posts exist
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for blog list page render pass

title: Blog Detay Page
description: Build the Blog Detay page (/blog/[slug]) with max-width 720px content area. Header: title (display size 4xl), date, author avatar + name, read time, category badges. Featured image: full-width, max-height 400px, object-cover. Article body: prose styling (custom typography per PRD), h2/h3 with id anchors for TOC, inline code (bg-background-subtle), code blocks (bg-#0d0d12), blockquotes (border-l-4 border-primary), links (text-primary with external link icon). Table of contents: sticky sidebar (desktop), collapsible (mobile) with active section highlighting. Share buttons: Twitter, LinkedIn, Copy link. Footer: tags list with hover effects, author bio card, related articles (2-3 based on category/tags), comments placeholder (giscus integration ready).
acceptanceCriteria: Dynamic route [slug] renders correct blog post content
Prose typography matches PRD specifications (p: text-lg, h2: text-2xl font-bold text-primary)
Code blocks have #0d0d12 background, copy button works
Blockquotes render with border-l-4 border-primary
TOC sidebar is sticky on desktop with active section highlighting
TOC collapses to accordion on mobile
Share buttons work (Twitter, LinkedIn open share URLs, Copy copies link)
Related articles show 2-3 posts from same category/tags
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for blog detail page render pass

title: Hakkında (About) Page
description: Build the Hakkında page (/about) with profile hero (circular avatar 200px with 4px primary border and glow on hover, gradient text name, title, short bio, availability status toggle), experience timeline (vertical line 2px primary at 0.3 opacity, alternating left/right items on desktop / stacked on mobile, date badge + title + description + company, current item highlighted with primary border, fade-in + slide-up animation on scroll with stagger), skills grid (categories: Frontend, Backend, Database, DevOps, Tools, Soft Skills, each skill with icon + name + proficiency bar bg-background-subtle filled bg-primary, animated on view), currently learning section, and CV download button.
acceptanceCriteria: Avatar renders at 200px with 4px primary border and glow on hover
Gradient text on name using bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-accent
Timeline vertical line renders at 2px primary with 0.3 opacity
Timeline items alternate left/right on desktop, stack on mobile
Current experience item has primary border highlight
Scroll animation triggers fade-in + slide-up with 100ms stagger
Skills grid renders 6 categories with icon + name + proficiency bar
Proficiency bar animates from 0 to value when scrolled into view
CV download button triggers file download
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for about page render pass

title: İletişim (Contact) Page
description: Build the İletişim page (/contact) with split layout (form left, info right desktop; single column mobile). Contact form: First Name + Last Name row, Email, Subject, Message (textarea, auto-resize), Send Message button (full-width bg-primary). All inputs: bg-background-elevated, border-border, focus:border-primary with ring. Validation: firstName/lastName (2-50 chars, letters), email (valid format), subject (5-200 chars), message (20-2000 chars). Real-time validation on blur with inline error messages. Submit button loading state (spinner), form disabled during submit. Success: toast notification + form reset + 'Mesajınız iletildi!' message. Info section: email mailto link with icon, location 'Türkiye', timezone (Europe/Istanbul), social links, availability status (green dot + 'Şu an müsaitim' / 'Müsait değilim').
acceptanceCriteria: Form layout: First Name + Last Name side-by-side, rest full-width
All validation rules work correctly on blur
Submit button shows spinner during submission
Form resets and shows success toast on successful submit
Inline error messages appear below invalid fields
Info section shows email with mailto: link
Availability status shows green dot + text
Split layout on desktop, single column on mobile
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for contact page render and form validation pass

title: SEO, Metadata & Structured Data
description: Implement the full SEO system: default SEO in layout.tsx (title template '%s | Hikmet Güleşli', meta description, Open Graph, Twitter Card, robots), generateMetadata function for each page with page-specific values, JSON-LD structured data (Person schema on homepage, Article schema on blog posts, Breadcrumb schema on all pages), sitemap.xml generation, robots.txt. Page SEO: blog posts include article schema with publishedTime, author, tags; projects include og:type article with thumbnail image. Canonical URLs for all pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Default metadata renders in layout with correct title template
Homepage has Person JSON-LD schema
Blog posts have Article JSON-LD schema with publishedTime and author
All pages have Breadcrumb JSON-LD schema
Sitemap includes all static and dynamic routes
robots.txt allows crawlers and disallows /api/ and /_next/
Open Graph images point to /og-image.png
Twitter card is summary_large_image
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for SEO metadata render pass

title: 404 Error Page & Global Error Boundaries
description: Build custom 404 page with: error message 'Sayfa Bulunamadı', illustration, navigation links (Ana Sayfa, Projeler, Blog), and recent posts suggestions. Build global error boundary (error.tsx) with: friendly error message, retry button, report option. Implement not-found.tsx for route-level 404s. Ensure all error pages follow PRD dark theme and design tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: 404 page renders with navigation links to main pages
404 page shows recent posts for suggestions
Error boundary catches errors and shows retry button
Error boundary styling matches dark theme
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for error pages render pass

title: Integration Wiring & End-to-End Verification
description: Wire all components into their pages, verify all routes are navigable with no dead routes, confirm all interactive elements (buttons, forms, links) trigger real functionality, verify no placeholder text ('Yakında', 'TODO', etc.) remains, verify state transitions work end-to-end (form validation → submit → success toast), verify all pages import and render real components from src/components/, verify Header/Footer appear on all pages, verify responsive breakpoints work at all sizes, remove all orphan/dead code files from previous stories that were superseded by integration wiring. Clean up any duplicate utility files, remove story-specific standalone components that were replaced by unified modules.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages import components from src/components/ (not inline definitions)
All routes (/, /projects, /projects/[slug], /blog, /blog/[slug], /about, /contact) are navigable
No placeholder text exists anywhere ('Yakında', 'TODO', 'Game Started', etc.)
Header renders consistently on all pages with correct active state
Footer renders consistently on all pages
Contact form end-to-end: validation → submit → success toast → form reset
All interactive elements have working handlers (buttons, links, form inputs)
Responsive layout works at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1024px+) breakpoints
All orphan/dead code files removed (duplicate utilities, story-specific helpers, standalone components replaced by integration)
Typecheck passes with no errors
Tests for integration wiring pass
